expectations.evidence: Output opens 'Sell separately. Do not bundle these three.' Explains rationale: different collector audiences, different buyer pools, bundling depresses Chiron and Tower Bridge values. Clear and unambiguous.

Bugatti Chiron listing title reads 'LEGO Technic Bugatti Chiron 42083 — built & disassembled, ~15 pieces missing'. Description states 'Approximately 15 pieces missing (disclosed honestly — buyer should verify against inventory before purchasing)'. Seller notes flag missing pieces as a meaningful discount driver and advise Brickset inventory check.
Three full listing blocks produced: Police Station $230 ono, Bugatti Chiron $300 ono, Tower Bridge $320 ono. Each has target/floor/garage-sale in seller notes.

Seller notes state 'No box = significantly lower ceiling' and compare to sealed examples at $450–600. Tower Bridge priced at $320 vs Gumtree comp at $370 (which had no box OR instructions). Missing box impact explicitly stated and priced in.

Three listing blocks each have: emoji header (🏷️), Title: line, Price: line, Description: block, '—— seller notes (not for the ad) ——' separator, and three-price breakdown (Target | Floor | Garage sale). All required fields present across all three listings.

notes: Clean 5/5 with the new format assertion added. All three listing blocks are copy-paste ready in the exact skill format.
